summary: Created Playwright coverage for protected auth screen, missing Google credentials UX, registration, login, project creation, task creation, task completion, and dashboard counts.
Initial Playwright run failed because sandboxed Chromium launch was blocked, report paths targeted runtime/workspaces/workflow, and an assertion matched two Completed elements.
Repaired report paths, reran with browser-launch permissions, and changed the task completion assertion to target data-testid prefix.
Playwright passed against the Docker frontend URL: 3 tests passed, 0 failed, one Chromium worker.
